pitchSequence.description: Fastball called a strike
Curveball outside
Fouled back and out of play
Fastball called a strike at the knees, and Bradleys is down on strikes

notes: 4-pitch AB, called strikeout looking. Count was 1-2 when final strike called. Righty-lefty matchup.

pitchSequence.description: Slider misses low
Slider called a strike
Fastball high and tight, brushes him back
Swung on and lifted behind second base. Cortez is under it and makes the catch

notes: 4-pitch AB, popup to Cortez behind second base. Count was 2-1 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball down and in
Ground ball to short. Slauson scoops it up and fires to first to retire De Jesus to end the inning

notes: 2-pitch AB, groundout 6-3. Count was 1-0 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Padolina. Padolina with a 1-2-3 opening frame.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball in there for a called strike
Misses downstairs
Spanked into left center. Vega drifting over and puts the squeeze on it

notes: 3-pitch AB, flyout to Vega in left center. Count was 1-1 when put in play. Righty-lefty matchup.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball misses outside
Slashed foul into the stands
Ground ball to short. Stipe is up with it and fires to first to retire Slauson

notes: 3-pitch AB, groundout 6-3. Count was 1-1 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup.

pitchSequence.description: Hammered foul and out of play
Fastball outside
Fouls another one off
Bouncer to short. Stipe has it and tosses over to first to retire Cortez to end the inning

notes: 4-pitch AB, groundout 6-3. Count was 1-2 when put in play. Switch hitter bats left vs RHP Sanborn. One scoreless inning in the books.
